title: CreateOQL
body:
# Create OQL: A High-Performance Minecraft Experience

## Overview

**Create OQL** is a meticulously curated modpack that focuses on performance and creativity. With the **Create** mod as its centerpiece, this pack offers a wide array of optimizations and quality-of-life improvements that elevate your Minecraft experience to new heights.

## Key Features

- **Performance-Optimized**: Enjoy smoother gameplay thanks to mods like Sodium, Lithium, and FerriteCore.
- **Create as Core Mod**: Dive into the world of automation and engineering with the popular Create mod.
- **Visual Enhancements**: Pre-installed shaders and graphics mods for a stunning visual experience.
- **User-Friendly**: Numerous QoL mods improve game mechanics and interface.

## Pre-Installed Shaders

Immerse yourself in the Minecraft world with a selection of high-quality shaders:

- BSL
- Complementary (Reimagined & Unbound)
- Bliss
- Lux V1
- Insanity
- Solas
- MakeUp - Ultra Fast
- Pastel

## Mod Highlights

### Performance & Optimization
- Sodium & Sodium Extra
- Lithium
- FerriteCore
- EntityCulling
- ImmediatelyFast
### Nvidium Mod

This modpack includes the Nvidium mod, a powerful performance enhancer designed specifically for NVIDIA GPUs. Please note the following:

- **NVIDIA GPU Required**: Nvidium only functions on systems with NVIDIA GPUs that support mesh shaders (16xx series and newer, including 20xx series).
- **Automatic Disabling**: On non-NVIDIA systems, Nvidium will automatically disable itself to prevent any issues.

### Gameplay Enhancements
- Create & Extensions (CreateAddition, CreateDeco)
- Roughly Enough Items (REI)
- Traveler's Backpack
- AppleSkin
- Xaero's Minimap & World Map

### Graphics & User Interface
- Iris (Shader support)
- Continuity
- ModMenu
- Zoomify

## Create Mod Features

The Create mod is the heart of this pack, offering:

- **Rotational Power**: Build complex machines using water wheels, windmills, and more.
- **Automation**: Create contraptions to automate various processes in your Minecraft world.
- **New Components**: Explore a wide range of mechanical components and block variants.
- **Optimized Performance**: Enjoy good FPS even with complex creations.

## Compatibility & Performance

This modpack has been carefully assembled to ensure maximum compatibility and performance. It's optimized for a wide range of systems, from entry-level PCs to high-end machines.

---

**Note**: All mods in this pack are publicly available and are used with respect for the work of their developers. Please be aware of the individual licenses of the mods.
